Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor (Cradle)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor's support will arrive once a winner is made clear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's forces would cripple an aggressor in a day if war were declared openly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is a figure Cassias believes will not allow certain actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor holds the title to the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Huan is the Emperor.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei intends to bring word of the situation to the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is gathering his Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn serve in the name of the Emperor.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor ordered that operations follow Naru Gwei's orders.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan may work for the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The expedition was fueled by the Emperor’s power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor wore green sacred artist's robes and had wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor possesses a Blackflame sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor of the Blackflame Empire possesses emerald wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor held a celebratory feast.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Huan holds the title of Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya advises Lindon to present himself to the Emperor upon returning to the Empire.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor is from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon did not tell the Emperor about his combat advantages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor can release blasts of wind that tear apart trees.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
